text:
- **Epic [#228](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/228)** (`epic`, `north-star`, `refactor:architecture`) — North Star, the two falsifiable targets, the frontier classification table, the `probe` conformance surface, the gated roadmap, and the 7 upstream asks. Builds on #202.
- **Slices [#229–#240](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/228)**: Phase 0 (labels + all-commit ledger / probe stats + oracle / frontier.rs + seams + CI ratchet), Phase 1 (capsules / `tx.preview`→`probe simulate` / promote hook_context), Phase 2 (diff + acid + seeded-bug corpus), Phase 3 (turn_lifecycle → cursor → outbox → session_start-capped-at-shadow), and the case-study writeup. Epic checklist links all 12; #228 and the `probe simulate` slice #233 are cross-linked to trellis PR #164. [...] - **Slices [#229–#240](https://github.com/pablof7z/tenex-edge/issues/228)**: Phase 0 (labels + all-commit ledger / probe stats + oracle / frontier.rs + seams + CI ratchet), Phase 1 (capsules / `tx.preview`→`probe simulate` / promote hook_context), Phase 2 (diff + acid + seeded-bug corpus), Phase 3 (turn_lifecycle → cursor → outbox → session_start-capped-at-shadow), and the case-study writeup. Epic checklist links all 12; #228 and the `probe simulate` slice #233 are cross-linked to trellis PR #164.
